title: Integrate Windsurf & SonarQube MCP Server
markdown:
I appreciate your request, but I need to be transparent: the transcript provided contains only music cues and applause markers with no actual spoken content or technical information about Windsurf, SonarQube, or MCP Server integration.

Without substantive technical details from the video, I cannot write an accurate article about this topic. Creating content about the integration would require me to hallucinate features and information, which violates your instruction to maintain technical accuracy and avoid fabrication.

**To help you, I would need:**
- An actual transcript with spoken dialogue and technical explanations
- Details about what Windsurf and SonarQube integration accomplishes
- Information about the MCP Server setup process
- Any code examples or configuration steps discussed

If you have access to the full video transcript or a corrected version, please share it and I'll be happy to write a comprehensive, accurate article following your formatting guidelines.
